result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Seek is a fast filesystem search tool for files and directories by David Shnayder (@dusrdev).

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Search query

Options:
  -r, --regex          Treat the query as regex pattern
  --case-sensitive     Perform a case sensitive search
  -p, --plain          Disable matching section highlight
  --absolute           Emit absolute paths instead of paths relative to the selected root
  --null               Emit machine-readable NUL-terminated paths for safe piping, implies --plain and --absolute
  -h, --hidden         Include hidden files and folders
  -s, --system         Include system files and folders
  -f, --files          Match only against files
  -d, --directories    Match only against directories
  --root <string>      The root path from which to scan [Default: @"."]

Commands:
  check-for-updates    Check whether a new version is available
  delete               Delete matching files and directories.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Seek is a fast filesystem search tool for files and directories by David Shnayder (@dusrdev).

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Search query

Options:
  -r, --regex          Treat the query as regex pattern
  --case-sensitive     Perform a case sensitive search
  -p, --plain          Disable matching section highlight
  --absolute           Emit absolute paths instead of paths relative to the selected root
  --null               Emit machine-readable NUL-terminated paths for safe piping, implies --plain and --absolute
  -h, --hidden         Include hidden files and folders
  -s, --system         Include system files and folders
  -f, --files          Match only against files
  -d, --directories    Match only against directories
  --root <string>      The root path from which to scan [Default: @"."]

Commands:
  check-for-updates    Check whether a new version is available
  delete               Delete matching files and directories.

result.stdout:
Usage: delete [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Delete matching files and directories.

Arguments:
  [0] <string>    Search query

Options:
  -r, --regex          Treat the query as regex pattern
  --case-sensitive     Perform a case sensitive search
  -h, --hidden         Include hidden files and folders
  -s, --system         Include system files and folders
  -f, --files          Match only against files
  -d, --directories    Match only against directories
  --no-progress        Disable progress reporting
  --root <string>      The root path from which to scan [Default: @"."]
  --apply              Perform the deletion instead of previewing candidates

commands.payload:

Arguments:

Options:
  -r, --regex          Treat the query as regex pattern

  -h, --hidden         Include hidden files and folders
  -s, --system         Include system files and folders
  -f, --files          Match only against files
  -d, --directories    Match only against directories
  --no-progress        Disable progress reporting
  --root <string>      The root path from which to scan [Default: @"."]
  --apply              Perform the deletion instead of previewing candidates
